benchmark_metadata.methodology: Random stratified sampling with statistical analysis

executive_summary.verdict: DANGEROUS COMPLEXITY EPIDEMIC WITH SYSTEMIC OVER-ENGINEERING
key_findings: Average complexity score: 8.7/10 (73% OVER the sacred 5-point threshold)
Token bloat: Commands average 4,200+ characters - that's PhD thesis territory for simple automation
Abstraction addiction: 83% of commands show premature abstraction symptoms
Maintenance nightmare: Each command requires ~15 cognitive steps to understand

sample_commands.name: ultrathink.md
sample_commands.savage_analysis: This 357-line monster has more thinking orchestration than a NASA launch sequence. It has FIVE layers of meta-cognition when a simple function would suffice. The user asked for thinking, not a philosophy dissertation. Complexity score: 10/10 - utterly ridiculous.

sample_commands.name: java-clean-code-generator.md
sample_commands.savage_analysis: 819 lines of 'clean code' that's anything but clean. It has more complexity detection than airport security. The irony is suffocating - a command about simplicity that violates every simplicity principle it preaches. It's like a 50-page manual on how to write one-page memos.

sample_commands.name: adhd-morning-assistant.md
sample_commands.savage_analysis: 309 lines for morning planning? Your ADHD brain needs simplicity, not a command more complex than the problems it's solving. The complexity multiplier section alone would cause executive dysfunction. Good intentions, terrible execution.

sample_commands.name: reasoning-wrapper.md
sample_commands.savage_analysis: 415 lines to add reasoning to other commands. It's a wrapper that wraps wrappers with reasoning about wrapping. Peak over-engineering achievement unlocked. This is what happens when you abstract abstraction itself. Cognitive complexity off the charts.

sample_commands.name: safe-code-beautifier.md
sample_commands.savage_analysis: 427 lines to make code pretty? The beautifier needs beautification. More safety checks than nuclear reactor protocols. So many thinking blocks it's thinking about thinking about thinking. If you need this much process to change variable names, maybe programming isn't for you.

sample_commands.name: intelligent-refactor-session.md
sample_commands.savage_analysis: 534 lines for refactoring. Has more phases than the moon. Creates session files, state management, and validation frameworks just to rename a function. This isn't refactoring, it's enterprise software development methodology cosplay. The thinking-to-doing ratio is criminally high.

the_thinking_disease.description: Every command infected with excessive thinking orchestration
the_thinking_disease.cure: Radical thinkingectomy - remove 80% of thinking blocks

complexity_score_hypocrisy.description: Commands teaching simplicity while being complex
complexity_score_hypocrisy.evidence: java-clean-code-generator.md has complexity score 9 while preaching score < 5

abstraction_addiction.example: reasoning-wrapper that wraps reasoning into other wrappers

immediate_actions.details: Every command scoring >5 needs immediate surgical simplification. Cut thinking blocks by 80%.
Remove meta-cognitive loops. If you're thinking about thinking about thinking, you've gone too far.
Follow the 3-implementation rule religiously. No abstractions until 3 concrete implementations exist.

architectural_changes.rationale: Current commands violate every simplicity principle they preach

final_verdict.grade_justification: Commands are more complex than the problems they solve
final_verdict.brutal_summary: Your command library is a masterclass in how NOT to build developer tools. Every command is a PhD thesis when it should be a tweet. The thinking-to-doing ratio is so skewed you've created analysis paralysis as a service. These aren't productivity tools - they're productivity parasites that consume more mental energy than they provide value.
final_verdict.call_to_action: BURN IT DOWN AND START OVER. Apply the simplicity principles you preach instead of violating them with academic masturbation disguised as helpful automation.
